responses.roadComment: There is a specific road here that is constructed every 5-6 months or so, and within 2-3 days its completely disintegrated.
responses.loveText: Since my area is on the outskirts of the city, the light pollution here is lesser than that in the main city so I am able to look at stars sometimes.
responses.commentsText: The levels of pollution here is horrible mostly air pollution (dust) (avg AQI 120) that is caused by the going on metro construction.
